query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agenticsts: a bounded-memory testbed for long-horizon llm agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational review and canonical reference for the "memory" and "harness engineering" components of the user's question regarding bounded-memory testbeds for LLM agents. It provides the necessary systems-level framework and vocabulary (externalization, memory stores, protocols) that a literature review on extending the AgenticSTS testbed would require to contextualize the shift from internal weights to external infrastructure.
